treatment_timeline.event: Thrombocytopenia detected during treatment for neonatal jaundice
Kidney biopsy revealed atypical membranoproliferative glomerulonephritis
Muscle biopsy specimens taken from the rectus femoris
Mutation analysis of GNE identified two missense mutations
Patient has been wheelchair-bound since the age of 24 years
Mildly decreased cardiac function accompanied by mitral insufficiency

patient_outcome.final_status: Wheelchair-bound with mildly decreased cardiac function
patient_outcome.complications: Chronic renal failure requiring periodic dialysis therapy, mildly decreased cardiac function
